title: Hieracium cardiobasis

This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its flower structure and leaf arrangement, which are typical of the Asteraceae family. The genus Hieracium is further divided into several sections and subsections, with Hieracium cardiobasis being part of one of these smaller groups. More specific classification of Hieracium cardiobasis would require further research and analysis of its morphology and genetics.
